privileged_info_summary: The patient is Tracey Crona (ID 15) with DOB 1981-07-02, verified in the FreeMED database initialization script (patients.sql). This patient is a synthetic individual generated by Synthea v3. The task target vitals (BP 119/73, HR 70, Temp 98.4F, Weight 160 lbs, Height 61 inches) match the instructions in task.json and the task documentation (evidence_docs/04_patient_data.txt). The task documentation states these vitals originate from a Synthea encounter on 2023-10-19, although the raw Synthea encounter files are not included in the environment.
